title: Incorrect affinity for indexed range constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL AND created_at > TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: Incorrect affinity for indexed range constraint
